audit_items.proof_trace: The live balance is read at line 437 via `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` and the guard at lines 438-440 reverts if `amount > availableBalance`. The transfer at line 444 follows immediately; the only intervening call is `_getAssetOutAmount` (line 442), which is `internal view` and cannot modify any token balance, ensuring the check-to-transfer window contains no state-changing external calls. EVM sequential execution eliminates any true concurrency between transactions.
